nasb.text: ‘For six days work may be done, but on the seventh day there is a sabbath of complete rest, a holy convocation. You shall not do any work; it is a sabbath to the Lord in all your dwellings.

esv.text: “Six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day is a Sabbath of solemn rest, a holy convocation. You shall do no work. It is a Sabbath to the Lord in all your dwelling places.

cnv.text: “六日要工作，但第七日是完全休歇的安息日，應當有聖會；甚麼工你們都不可作；在你們的一切住處，這日是歸耶和華的安息日。

ccb.text: “你们一周可以工作六天，但第七天是安息日，你们要休息，举行圣会。不可做任何工，无论你们住在哪里，都要守耶和华的安息日。
